name: Session 8: A New Dawn - The Adventures of Tamera: Ruarden Hold
description:
Weeks after the icy clutches of Ruarden Hold, Merla and Cordelia find themselves free of their magical afflictions. Terra, who discovered it was no longer safe for her to return to her guild, is now without anyone to rely upon. 

And so, the three find themselves along with Teresa, at the beginning of a new dawn and with one question left unanswered: "Where to next?"
